description_long: This is a simple, straight ladder constructed from what appears to be natural wood. It features two vertical side rails and seven evenly spaced horizontal rungs, all of which are rectangular in profile. The wood has a light, natural finish, and there are no visible coatings, hardware, or additional safety features. The ladder is narrow and lightweight, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or for accessing low rooftops. The design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or branding visible. The overall construction suggests it is intended for manual handling and temporary placement rather than permanent installation.
description: A narrow, light wood ladder with seven rectangular rungs and two vertical side rails, finished in a natural wood tone. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible safety features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven horizontal rungs and both vertical side rails clearly.
description_view_1: Side profile view, revealing the thinness of the ladder and the rectangular cross-section of the rails and rungs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all rungs and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile and rung alignment.
